text: WarMonitor Trump has convened a WH situation room meeting to discuss who to blame this time. BREAKING: President Trump has convened a White House Situation Room meeting to discuss Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz as the ceasefire is set to expire in 3 days. Details include: 1. The situation with Iran is at a "critical point" and no final date has been set for a new meeting between the US and Iran 2. US officials say that if there is no breakthrough soon, the war could resume in the coming days 3. The renewed crisis in the Strait of Hormuz arose amid discussion regarding Iran's uranium enrichment 4. Trump says he will know by end of day if a deal is going to happen Trump concludes by saying Iran "can't blackmail us." - The Kobeissi Letter tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普已召集白宫战情室会议，讨论这次该责怪谁。突发：特朗普总统已召集白宫战情室会议，讨论伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡的问题，因为停火协议即将在3天后到期。详情包括：1. 伊朗局势处于“关键点”，美伊之间尚未确定新的会谈日期；2. 美国官员表示，如果近期没有突破，战争可能会在未来几天内恢复；3. 霍尔木兹海峡的危机重燃是在讨论伊朗铀浓缩问题的背景下发生的；4. 特朗普表示，他将在今天结束前知道是否会达成协议。特朗普最后表示，伊朗“无法勒索我们。” - The Kobeissi Letter 推文

text: OSINTdefender Radio audio from today’s Iranian attack on the Indian-flagged crude oil tanker, M/T SANMAR HERALD, while the vessel was attempting to pass eastbound through the Strait of Hormuz, after reportedly been given permission by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGC-N). The SANMAR HERALD has since withdrawn back to the Persian Gulf, with the IRGC-N once again announcing the total closure of the Hormuz Strait. Audio credit: @TankerTrackers tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 来自今天伊朗袭击悬挂印度国旗的原油轮“SANMAR HERALD”号的无线电音频，当时该船正试图向东通过霍尔木兹海峡，据报道此前已获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）的许可。“SANMAR HERALD”号此后已撤回波斯湾，伊斯兰革命卫队海军再次宣布全面关闭霍尔木兹海峡。音频来源：@TankerTrackers 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 The U.S. is prepared to resume military operations against Iran if negotiations fail to produce a breakthrough, Axios reports, citing sources. According to the outlet, Donald Trump held a meeting on Saturday to discuss the escalating situation in the Strait of Hormuz and the state of talks with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 据 Axios 援引消息人士报道，如果谈判未能取得突破，美国准备恢复对伊朗的军事行动。据该媒体报道，唐纳德·特朗普周六举行了会议，讨论霍尔木兹海峡日益紧张的局势以及与伊朗的谈判状况。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇪 Ireland is entering its eighth consecutive day of mass protests over soaring fuel prices, as residents describe being forced to cut back on basic heating costs just to get by. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇪 爱尔兰因燃料价格飙升引发的大规模抗议活动已进入第八天，居民们描述说，为了维持生计，他们被迫削减基本取暖费用。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 Kurdistan24: A high‑level Iranian delegation has arrived in Baghdad to mediate between leaders of Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework and break the deadlock over the country’s next prime minister. The delegation is headed by Esmail Qaani, commander…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 Kata’ib Hezbollah spokesperson Abu Mujahid al-Assaf praised Hezbollah’s steadfastness in the “40‑day war”, claiming it forced the US‑Israeli enemy to accept an agreement. He called for a new coordination mechanism between resistance forces to open new fronts against American and Israeli interests. The statement warned the Kuwaiti government over its treatment of a specific segment of the population during the war. On Iraq, it threatened that the security of the US embassy is conditional, and vowed to dismantle security institutions linked to the “occupation” and remove their influence from ministries. Regarding Iraq’s stalled government formation, the official said that if Nouri al‑Maliki or Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani cannot secure the premiership, the role should remain within their blocs to prevent one group from monopolising all four presidencies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 Kurdistan24：一个伊朗高级代表团已抵达巴格达，旨在伊拉克什叶派协调框架领导人之间进行调解，以打破该国下一任总理人选的僵局。该代表团由伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）指挥官率领……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 真主党旅发言人阿布·穆贾希德·阿萨夫（Abu Mujahid al-Assaf）称赞了真主党在“40天战争”中的坚定立场，声称这迫使美以敌人接受了一项协议。他呼吁在抵抗力量之间建立新的协调机制，以开辟针对美国和以色列利益的新战线。该声明警告科威特政府在战争期间对待特定人口群体的做法。关于伊拉克，声明威胁称美国大使馆的安全是有条件的，并誓言要拆除与“占领者”有关的安全机构，并消除它们在各部委的影响力。关于伊拉克陷入僵局的组阁问题，该官员表示，如果努里·马利基（Nouri al-Maliki）或穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al-Sudani）无法确保总理职位，该角色应保留在他们的集团内，以防止一个团体垄断所有四个总统职位。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶🇮🇷🇮🇶🇺🇸 Shafaq News: Iran’s Quds Force commander, Esmail Qaani, has arrived in Baghdad for an unannounced visit, meeting armed faction leaders and figures from the Shiite Coordination Framework as negotiations over Iraq’s next prime minister remain unresolved.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 Kurdistan24 : A high‑level Iranian delegation has arrived in Baghdad to mediate between leaders of Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework and break the deadlock over the country’s next prime minister. The delegation is headed by Esmail Qaani, commander of the IRGC’s Quds Force. Qaani is scheduled to meet senior Iraqi political figures to bridge internal divisions within the alliance, which has struggled to agree on a unified candidate. The Coordination Framework aims to finalise its nomination for prime minister by Monday, following weeks of political paralysis. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶🇮🇷🇮🇶🇺🇸 Shafaq News：伊朗圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）已抵达巴格达进行未宣布的访问，会见了武装派系领导人和什叶派协调框架的人物，因为关于伊拉克下一任总理的谈判仍未解决……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 Kurdistan24：一个高级别伊朗代表团已抵达巴格达，旨在调解伊拉克什叶派协调框架领导人之间的分歧，并打破该国下一任总理人选的僵局。该代表团由伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼率领。卡尼计划会见伊拉克高级政治人物，以弥合联盟内部的分歧，该联盟在就统一候选人达成一致方面一直举步维艰。在经历了数周的政治瘫痪后，协调框架旨在周一前敲定其总理提名。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Speaker of Iran's Parliament, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: "It is impossible for others to pass through the Strait of Hormuz while we cannot." In a televised address, Ghalibaf said the Strait of Hormuz is "under the control of the Islamic Republic" and warned that if the U.S. does not lift its blockade, "traffic in the Strait of Hormuz will definitely be restricted." He claimed Iran responded to a U.S. mine-clearing attempt, calling it a ceasefire violation, and said he personally told the American delegation in Islamabad that Iran would fire on any further movement. He said the Americans "requested 15 minutes to get orders and then retreated." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）：“如果我们在霍尔木兹海峡无法通行，其他人也别想通过。”卡利巴夫在电视讲话中表示，霍尔木兹海峡“处于伊斯兰共和国的控制之下”，并警告称，如果美国不解除封锁，“霍尔木兹海峡的交通绝对会受到限制”。他声称伊朗对美国的一次扫雷行动做出了回应，称其违反了停火协议，并表示他亲自告诉伊斯兰堡的美国代表团，伊朗将对任何进一步的行动开火。他说，美国人“要求15分钟时间请示命令，随后撤退了。” tweet

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 BIG | Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps: The American enemy did not lift the naval blockade of Iranian vessels and ports; therefore, the Strait of Hormuz will be blocked until this blockade is lifted. We warn that no vessel should move from its anchorage in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman, and approaching the Strait of Hormuz will be considered cooperation with the enemy, and the violating vessel will be targeted. The statements of the U.S. President regarding the Strait of Hormuz and the Persian Gulf have no credibility, and ships should follow updates only from the official source of our naval forces. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 重大消息 | 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：美国敌人没有解除对伊朗船只和港口的封锁；因此，在封锁解除之前，霍尔木兹海峡将被封锁。我们警告，任何船只不得离开其在波斯湾和阿曼湾的锚地，接近霍尔木兹海峡将被视为与敌人合作，违规船只将成为目标。美国总统关于霍尔木兹海峡和波斯湾的声明没有任何可信度，船只应仅遵循我们海军官方来源的最新消息。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Parliament Speaker, Ghalibaf: The Strait of Hormuz is under the control of the Islamic Republic of Iran. We responded decisively to the U.S. attempt at mine-clearing and considered it a violation of the ceasefire. The situation escalated close to confrontation, but the enemy backed down. If traffic is currently taking place in the Strait, it is because control of the Strait is in our hands. The Americans have announced a blockade in recent days this is a reckless and ignorant decision. It is impossible for others through the Strait while we cannot. If the U.S. does not lift the blockade, movement through the Strait of Hormuz will definitely be restricted. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：霍尔木兹海峡处于伊朗伊斯兰共和国的控制之下。我们果断回应了美国的扫雷企图，并认为这是对停火协议的违反。局势升级到接近对抗，但敌人退缩了。如果目前海峡内有交通往来，那是因为海峡的控制权掌握在我们手中。美国人最近几天宣布了封锁，这是一个鲁莽和无知的决定。如果我们在霍尔木兹海峡无法通行，其他人也别想通过。如果美国不解除封锁，通过霍尔木兹海峡的交通绝对会受到限制。 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Senior U.S. official tells Axios that if there is no breakthrough in peace negotiations soon, the war could resume in the coming days, with the current ceasefire set to expire Tuesday, April 21. U.S. President Donald J. Trump convened a meeting in the White House Situation Room on Saturday morning to discuss the renewed crisis around the Strait of Hormuz and negotiations with Iran, with attendees including Vice President JD Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, CIA Director John Ratliffe and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs Gen. Dan Caine, according to two U.S. officials who spoke to Axios. - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一位美国高级官员告诉 Axios，如果和平谈判近期没有突破，战争可能会在未来几天内重启，目前的停火协议定于4月21日星期二到期。据两名向 Axios 透露消息的美国官员称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普周六上午在白宫战情室召集会议，讨论围绕霍尔木兹海峡的新危机和与伊朗的谈判，与会者包括副总统JD·万斯、国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥（Marco Rubio）、国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）、财政部长斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）、特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）、中情局局长约翰·拉特克利夫（John Ratliffe）和参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩（Dan Caine）将军。 - OSINTdefender tweet

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump convened a meeting in the White House Situation Room on Saturday morning to discuss the renewed crisis around the Strait of Hormuz and negotiations with Iran, with attendees including Vice President JD Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, CIA Director John Ratliffe and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs Gen. Dan Caine, according to two U.S. officials who spoke to Axios. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据两名向 Axios 透露消息的美国官员称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普周六上午在白宫战情室召集会议，讨论围绕霍尔木兹海峡的新危机和与伊朗的谈判，与会者包括副总统JD·万斯、国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥、国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯、财政部长斯科特·贝森特、特使史蒂夫·威特科夫、中情局局长约翰·拉特克利夫和参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军。 tweet

text: Open Source Intel IRGC completely ignores Iranian FM Araghchi. IRGC is in control, not suits In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire, on the coordinated route as already announced by Ports and Maritime Organisation of the Islamic Rep. of Iran. - Seyed Abbas Araghchi tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊斯兰革命卫队完全无视伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐（Araghchi）。伊斯兰革命卫队掌握控制权，而不是那些穿西装的人。根据黎巴嫩停火协议，在停火剩余期间，所有商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道被宣布完全开放，航线按照伊朗伊斯兰共和国港口和海事组织已经宣布的协调路线进行。 - 赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Seyed Abbas Araghchi） tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Senior Hezbollah commander Ali Reda Abbas, also known as Haj Abu Hussein Barish – head of Hezbollah’s operations department and a senior commander of the elite Radwan Force – has reportedly been assassinated by the IDF. Abbas was appointed to his role following the elimination of his predecessor Ibrahim Aqil in a September 2024 Israeli strike in Beirut. He was implicated in the 2007 kidnapping and murder of five American soldiers in Karbala, Iraq, and established Hezbollah’s unit on the Syrian Golan Heights, tasked with opening a front against Israel. He had survived multiple past assassination attempts and was trained in Iran. As operations chief, Abbas oversaw Hezbollah’s military planning and cross‑border attacks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 据报道，真主党高级指挥官阿里·雷达·阿巴斯（Ali Reda Abbas，又名哈吉·阿布·侯赛因·巴里什）——真主党作战部门负责人及精锐拉德万部队（Radwan Force）的高级指挥官——已被以色列国防军暗杀。阿巴斯是在其前任易卜拉欣·阿基尔（Ibrahim Aqil）于2024年9月在贝鲁特的以色列空袭中被消灭后被任命为该职位的。他曾参与2007年在伊拉克卡尔巴拉绑架并谋杀五名美国士兵的事件，并建立了真主党在叙利亚戈兰高地的部队，负责开辟针对以色列的战线。他曾多次在过去的暗杀企图中幸存，并在伊朗接受过训练。作为作战主管，阿巴斯负责监督真主党的军事规划和跨境袭击。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah denies involvement in today's attack on a UNIFIL patrol in southern Lebanon that killed a French peacekeeper and wounded three others. UNIFIL said the patrol came under small-arms fire in the village of Ghanduriyah while clearing ordnance. Its initial assessment points to Hezbollah. French President Macron confirmed a French soldier was killed and said the attack was apparently carried out by Hezbollah. Hezbollah in a statement "calls for caution in issuing judgments" and "expresses surprise at the parties that rushed to throw accusations arbitrarily." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党否认参与了今天在黎巴嫩南部针对联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）巡逻队的袭击，该袭击导致一名法国维和人员死亡，另有三人受伤。联黎部队表示，巡逻队在甘杜里耶（Ghanduriyah）村清理弹药时遭到轻武器射击。其初步评估指向真主党。法国总统马克龙证实一名法国士兵死亡，并表示袭击显然是由真主党实施的。真主党在一份声明中“呼吁在做出判断时保持谨慎”，并“对各方急于随意指责表示惊讶”。推文

text: WarMonitor On the bright side, the economy only collapses from 4:01 PM to 9:29 AM ET on weekdays, then all weekend until Sunday night. The DOD sometimes rolls out a special rescue at 8 AM Monday mornings. @TheWarMonitor Great.... And when trump will reach his aims? Nobody knows, as there are no fukking objectives. And the world economy collapse in the meantime. Disaster. - rodriguez Fella 🇭🇺 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 从好的方面来看，经济只在工作日的下午 4:01 到次日上午 9:29 之间崩溃，然后整个周末直到周日晚上都会崩溃。国防部有时会在周一早上 8 点推出特别救援。@TheWarMonitor 太好了……特朗普什么时候才能实现他的目标？没人知道，因为根本就没有该死的具体目标。与此同时，世界经济正在崩溃。灾难。 - rodriguez Fella 🇭🇺 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The IDF says it eliminated SEVERAL Hezbollah terrorists after identifying a cell approaching troops in southern Lebanon in violation of the ceasefire, posing an immediate threat. The Israeli Air Force carried out the strike to neutralize the threat. In a separate incident south of the forward defense line, the IDF struck a Hezbollah tunnel shaft after multiple operatives were seen entering it. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 以色列国防军（IDF）表示，在黎巴嫩南部发现一个违反停火协议并构成直接威胁的武装小组靠近部队后，消灭了数名真主党恐怖分子。以色列空军执行了此次打击以消除威胁。在另一起事件中，在前方防线以南，以色列国防军在发现多名武装人员进入后，打击了一个真主党隧道竖井。推文

text: OSINTdefender Photos published early Saturday by the U.S. Navy showing food services onboard the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) and USS Tripoli (LHA-7) - both currently deployed to the Arabian Sea near Iran - following reports, that have since been denied, of dwindling food supplies and poor conditions onboard both vessels, due to supply constraints related to the still ongoing Iran War. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 周六早些时候发布的照片显示，美国海军“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号（CVN-72）和“的黎波里”号（LHA-7）航空母舰上的食品服务情况——这两艘舰艇目前都部署在伊朗附近的阿拉伯海——此前有报道称两艘舰艇上的食品供应减少且条件恶劣，但这些报道随后被否认，称这是由于与仍在进行的伊朗战争相关的供应限制所致。推文

text: WarMonitor Iran is warning any ship entering the Strait will be treated as siding with the enemy and could be targeted. An old-fashioned standoff. Iran's Revolutionary Guard Navy announces the Strait of Hormuz is closed until the US lifts the naval blockade, and any vessel approaching the Strait "will be considered cooperation with the enemy, and the offending vessel will be targeted" (from Iran state media IRNA) https://twitter.com/lookner/status/2045572798492324126/photo/1 - Steve Lookner tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗警告称，任何进入海峡的船只都将被视为站在敌人一边，并可能成为攻击目标。这是一场老式的对峙。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布，在美军解除海上封锁之前，霍尔木兹海峡处于关闭状态，任何接近海峡的船只“都将被视为与敌人合作，违规船只将成为攻击目标”（来自伊朗官方媒体伊通社）https://twitter.com/lookner/status/2045572798492324126/photo/1 - Steve Lookner 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Lindsey Graham: The Iranians have provided us with a lot of information to learn from over the past 24 hours if we choose. What have I learned? About 24 hours ago, the foreign minister, the guy in the suit, declared the straits open with full passage. Last night, the IRGC, the guys with the guns, attacked a container ship and said the straits were closed. Here’s what I’ve learned: the guy in the suit is not in charge. It’s the guys with the guns who are in charge. They are the IRGC, who are the Iranian equivalent of the SS/gestapo – an important distinction. We miss this distinction at our own peril. I have all the confidence in the world that President Trump will not let this provocation go unchallenged and will continue to push for a quick resolution through diplomacy or otherwise ensuring that: -The United States and the world will control the Strait of Hormuz, not Iran -The over 900 pounds of highly enriched uranium that could be used to make a dirty bomb or quickly enriched to become weapons grade material is completely removed from Iran -The Iranian missile and drone program will be limited, their support for terrorist organizations will come to an end, and there will never ever be a path in the future for Iran to develop a nuclear weapon by being allowed to enrich uranium. Like many other countries, Iran can have peaceful nuclear power but no enrichment. How this conflict ends will determine the stability of the region and the world for decades to come. Due to President Trump’s strong leadership through imposing the blockade and our brilliant military, over time, we have all the cards. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 林赛·格雷厄姆（Lindsey Graham）：如果我们要学习的话，伊朗人在过去 24 小时内为我们提供了大量信息。我学到了什么？大约 24 小时前，外交部长，那个穿西装的人，宣布海峡开放，可以完全通行。昨晚，伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC），那些拿枪的人，袭击了一艘集装箱船，并称海峡已关闭。这就是我学到的：穿西装的人并不掌权。掌权的是那些拿枪的人。他们是伊斯兰革命卫队，相当于伊朗的党卫军/盖世太保——这是一个重要的区别。如果我们忽视这种区别，后果自负。我完全相信特朗普总统不会让这种挑衅行为不受挑战，并将继续推动通过外交或其他方式迅速解决问题，确保：-美国和世界将控制霍尔木兹海峡，而不是伊朗；-伊朗完全移除可用于制造脏弹或快速浓缩为武器级材料的 900 多磅高浓缩铀；-伊朗的导弹和无人机计划将受到限制，他们对恐怖组织的支持将结束，并且未来绝不会允许伊朗通过浓缩铀来发展核武器。像许多其他国家一样，伊朗可以拥有和平的核能，但不能进行浓缩。这场冲突如何结束将决定该地区和世界未来几十年的稳定。由于特朗普总统通过实施封锁展现出的强有力领导，以及我们出色的军队，随着时间的推移，我们掌握了所有的主动权。推文
